name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf is an indoor golf venue that combines state-of-the-art simulator technology with a full-service bar and restaurant experience. The venue features Trackman-powered simulators, high-speed swing cameras, and access to over 200 virtual golf courses, including PGA Tour venues. Each location is designed to be a social hub where golfers can play, practice, and party, with a no-dress-code policy to create an accessible and welcoming environment. Members and non-members can book simulator bays by the hour, with prices varying by location and time, and enjoy a variety of amenities including expert coaching, junior clinics, leagues, and event hosting for large groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman launch monitors provide detailed swing and ball data
Over 200 world-class virtual courses including PGA Tour venues
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu available on-site
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible and welcoming
Variety of programs from leagues to junior clinics and private lessons

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-inspired menu available, including pizza, wings, and appetizers
Full-service bar with a wide variety of drinks and happy hour specials

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulators featuring launch monitors powered by Trackman

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full-service bar and kitchen on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 2-3 hours depending on your group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers junior clinics for kids ages 6-14 and is available for kids' parties, making it a family-friendly venue.
